greeting: Hey! I'm Abhi's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his work, skills, or experience. Try clicking one of the suggestions below!
fallback: That's an interesting question! I don't have a specific answer for that, but feel free to ask about Abhi's skills, projects, experience, or background. You can also reach out directly via the contact section!

responses.answer: I'm Abhiram Varma — a Data Scientist and AI Engineer based in Tucson, AZ. I specialize in building intelligent systems using Machine Learning, NLP, and Large Language Models. Currently, I'm a Graduate Data Scientist and AI/NLP Research Assistant at the University of Arizona, working on RAG systems and LLM applications. I love turning complex data into real-world impact! 🚀

Here are some of my key projects:

🤖 **AI Student Care Assistant** — An LLM-powered assistant using RAG pipelines that reduced student wait times by 60%.

📊 **Automated Analytics System** — End-to-end data pipeline automating 40+ hours of manual reporting weekly.

🔬 **NLP Research (RAG & LLMs)** — Published research improving retrieval accuracy by 28%.

📈 **Real-Time Sentiment Dashboard** — Live NLP dashboard tracking 50K+ data points daily.

Scroll down to the Projects section to see them in detail!

My tech toolkit includes:

💻 **Languages:** Python, SQL, R, JavaScript
🧠 **AI/ML:** Machine Learning, NLP, LLMs, RAG, Deep Learning
🌐 **Web:** React, Flask, FastAPI
📊 **Visualization:** Tableau, Power BI, D3.js
☁️ **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, Docker

I'm always learning and adding new tools to my arsenal!

Here's my journey so far:

🎓 **Graduate Data Scientist** @ University of Arizona (2023–Present) — Leading ML pipelines and research.

🔬 **AI/NLP Research Assistant** @ University of Arizona (2023–Present) — Working on RAG systems and LLM fine-tuning.

📈 **Data Analyst Intern** (2022–2023) — Built automated dashboards and data quality frameworks.

📊 **Data Analyst** @ MeeBuddy (2021–2022) — Built analytics infrastructure from the ground up.

Check the Experience section for more details!

I'm currently pursuing my graduate studies at the **University of Arizona** in Tucson, AZ, focusing on Data Science and AI. My academic work centers on NLP, Large Language Models, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems. I combine rigorous academic research with hands-on engineering to push the boundaries of what's possible with AI. 🎓

I'd love to connect! You can reach me through:

📧 **Email:** Check the contact section below
💼 **LinkedIn:** linkedin.com/in/abhiramvarma
🐙 **GitHub:** github.com/abhiramvarma

Scroll down to the Contact section or click the links in the navigation. Let's build something awesome together! 🤝

AI/ML is my core passion! I specialize in:

🧠 **NLP & LLMs** — Working with transformers, fine-tuning models, and building RAG systems.
📊 **Machine Learning** — Predictive modeling, anomaly detection, classification, and clustering.
🔍 **RAG Systems** — Building retrieval-augmented generation pipelines for domain-specific knowledge.

My research at UofA focuses on improving retrieval accuracy in RAG architectures. I believe the future of AI lies in making these systems more accurate, efficient, and accessible!

When I'm not training models or writing code, you'll find me:

🎮 Exploring new tech and side projects
📚 Reading about the latest in AI research
🏔️ Enjoying the beautiful Arizona outdoors
☕ Fueling up on coffee while brainstorming ideas

I'm a lifelong learner who believes in the intersection of curiosity and creativity!
